$comment: Schema for mission/features.json (architecture §5). Consumed by jq required-key checks, not a JSON-Schema engine — keep in sync with architecture.md.

description.description: Complete, self-contained work order. The worker sees ONLY this + AGENTS.md + contract excerpts + its skill.

milestone.description: Milestone number as a string, e.g. "1".

fulfills.description: Assertion IDs from validation-contract.md; [] allowed for infra features.

attempts.description: Incremented per worker attempt; 3 with failures => blocked.

handoffs.description: Paths of handoff files, appended per attempt.

fixes.description: For kind "fix": the original feature id. null otherwise.
